summary: Reposted One America News interview from 'Real America with Dan Ball.' A man in a dark suit and glasses speaks as a remote guest against a nighttime Washington skyline backdrop with the Capitol and Washington Monument. An OAN lower-third reads 'DECLARING WAR IN IMMIGRATION FRAUD.' The audio is the guest describing a USCIS effort to revet immigration cases and combat fraud.

script.scene: Man in a suit and glasses speaks as a remote guest before a DC skyline backdrop; chyron 'DECLARING WAR IN IMMIGRATION FRAUD.'
